rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATALINA A. WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to February 11, 2013 to allow time for a response to the Examiner's notes to be filed. Please see Local Rule 14.6. A supplemental declaration was faxed to the Examiner, but it must be filed and it must be signed by the Petitioner. The exception allowing an attorney to sign does not apply when the Petitioner is a fiduciary appointed in the proceeding. See CRC 7.103.
